subject: SSO login fails for finance team after IdP certificate rotation
body: Since the certificate rollover at 08:15 UTC, finance users see a blank callback page after Okta login. Payroll close is tonight and four users are blocked.

subject: API requests timing out during bulk user import
body: Our nightly import job started returning 504s after about 300 users. We retried twice with the same result. CSV payload is about 18 MB and this was stable last week.

subject: Managers cannot approve requests from mobile app
body: Approvals load on desktop but the mobile app shows 'request unavailable' for every pending approval. This started after the 3.18 release and affects iOS only so far.
